notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Graham Pauley. Austin Wells to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Austin Slater pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Austin Slater pops out to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Pitcher Ryan Yarbrough picks off Agustín Ramírez at 2nd on throw to shortstop José Caballero.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge plunked
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge hit by pitch. José Caballero scores. Ryan McMahon to 3rd. Trent Grisham to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Trent Grisham GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Trent Grisham grounds into a double play, shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Connor Norby. Ryan McMahon out at 2nd. Trent Grisham out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: José Caballero reached on error
notableEvents.detail: José Caballero reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Graham Pauley. Austin Wells to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Wild pitch run(s)
notableEvents.detail: Wild pitch by pitcher Tyler Phillips. Austin Wells scores. José Caballero to 3rd. Aaron Judge to 2nd.
